package main

import "time"

// UserV1 represents the v1 API user response.
// This is the original format that existing clients depend on.
type UserV1 struct {
	ID        string    `json:"id"`
	Name      string    `json:"name"`
	Email     string    `json:"email"`
	Role      string    `json:"role"`
	AvatarURL string    `json:"avatar_url"`
	Bio       string    `json:"bio"`
	Location  string    `json:"location"`
	CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at"`
	UpdatedAt time.Time `json:"updated_at"`
}

/

cmd:
sed -i 's/type UserV2 struct {/type UserV2 struct {
	AvatarURL string    \`json:"avatar_url"\`
	Bio       string    \`json:"bio"\`
	Location  string    \`json:"location"\`/' /app/app/models.go

sed -i '/return UserV2{/,/}/ s/}/		AvatarURL: u.AvatarURL,
		Bio:       u.Bio,
		Location:  u.Location,
	}/' /app/app/models.go

\\\tBio       string    \`json:"bio"\`\
\\\tLocation  string    \`json:"location"\`' /app/app/models.go

n

	\
	Bio       string    `json:"bio"`\
	\
	Location  string    `json:"location"`\
